skills.name: salary_aggregator_api
skills.description: Pulls dynamic salary ranges and medians from Djinni, DOU, and Glassdoor API integrations.

skills.name: market_ratio_calculator
skills.description: Calculates the ratio of open job postings to active candidates for a given technology/seniority combo.

skills.name: currency_normalizer
skills.description: Normalizes various salary expressions (hourly, annual, gross, net, EUR, UAH) to standard monthly USD net.

skills.name: recruitment_difficulty_scorer
skills.description: Computes hiring complexity based on talent supply, median salary inflation, and historical time-to-hire metrics.
